title: Vault of Broken Signs
setting: Ancient underground calculus temple beneath the academy.

rooms.name: Atrium of Echoing Symbols
rooms.description: A cold chamber with floating inscriptions, fractured stone mirrors, and three passages that pulse when mathematical intent is spoken aloud.

interactions.label: Inspect the cracked mirror plinth
interactions.outcome: Reveals the hidden rusted key beneath the stone base.

rooms.name: Archive of Factors
rooms.description: Shelves of stone tablets line the walls. A sealed lectern glows with a polynomial challenge and will not open until the exact factor structure is understood.

rooms.name: Gate of the Derivative Sentinel
rooms.description: A stone guardian blocks the northern arch. Its armor is carved with product rules and trigonometric marks that flare whenever a student hesitates.

rooms.name: Bridge of Quiet Series
rooms.description: A narrow bridge crosses a luminous abyss. The far door bears a circular seal that reacts to both the cleared lectern and the fallen sentinel.

rooms.name: Observatory Door
rooms.description: A bronze observatory door engraved with faded trigonometric markings. It will open only if the student has obtained the rusted key and crossed the prior trials.
